entry.title: Hello World!
entry.content:
Hello, world!
Breaking the Frame is a writing space for policy essays, conceptual notes, and reflective analysis on governance, technology, institutions, and public problems. It also explores books as frameworks for understanding the modern world — from political economy and organisational theory to risk, complexity, and sociotechnical systems.
If you need to contact me, please leave a comment under any article or email AuroMaris@protonmail.com
The map is not the territory. The policy is not the problem. The frame is.
